author: maintainer-agent

patch.value: Add OSSF Scorecard supply-chain security workflow with published results and SARIF code-scanning upload

scorecard.yml runs green on main (push + weekly cron) with ossf/scorecard-action pinned by commit SHA per repo convention; publish_results:true so the OpenSSF badge/API is live; SARIF uploaded to GitHub code scanning; OSSF Scorecard badge added to README; only free-for-open-source features used

message: Maintainer directive 2026-07-14: fully set up OSSF Scorecard (github.com/marketplace/actions/ossf-scorecard-action). Free for public repos. Workflow follows repo conventions from security.yml/codeql.yml: SHA-pinned actions with version comments, persist-credentials:false, least-privilege permissions (id-token:write + security-events:write on the job only), timeout-minutes. Complements existing Trivy/CodeQL/actionlint surface with supply-chain posture scoring (branch protection, token permissions, pinned dependencies, fuzzing, SAST signals).

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Implementation: .github/workflows/scorecard.yml authored per repo conventions — ossf/scorecard-action@4eaacf05 (v2.4.3, annotated tag dereferenced to commit), checkout v7.0.0 with persist-credentials:false, upload-artifact v7, codeql upload-sarif v4.37.0; triggers = push(main) + weekly cron + branch_protection_rule + workflow_dispatch; top-level permissions read-all, job-scoped security-events:write + id-token:write; publish_results:true; OpenSSF badge added to README. actionlint + local trivy misconfig clean.
